title: Eva podcasts
wikitext:
[]: Eva podcasts             Quote Post by ericm » Thu Jun 30, 2011 7:15 pm I am looking for podcasts that deal/have dealt with Eva, individual episodes/whatever.. thanks

[]: [insert witty comment here]             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Jun 30, 2011 7:42 pm http://blog.mistakesofyouth.com/category/podcast/ The last two Mistakes of Youth podcasts had Aaron on while they all chatted about 2.22 back when it first came out. There was a more recent one with ANN but I don't have the link to it.

[]: I'm kidding. Please don't break my knees.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Jun 30, 2011 10:58 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: You should visit my site: http://www.evamonkey.com/podcasts/

[]: Re: I'm kidding. Please don't break my knees.             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jul 01, 2011 8:02 am Killer Bee wrote: You have a site?
